name: CoordinateSystem
summary: The CoordinateSystem class defines a coordinate system in space. The system is defined by an origin, an X-axis and a Y-axis. The Z-axis is the cross product of the X-axis and the Y-axis.

constructors.name: CoordinateSystem
constructors.summary: Instantiates a coordinate system in the current work plane.

constructors.name: CoordinateSystem
constructors.summary: Instantiates a coordinate system with the given origin, X-axis and Y-axis.

properties.name: AxisX
properties.summary: The X-axis of the coordinate system.

properties.name: AxisY
properties.summary: The Y-axis of the coordinate system.

properties.name: Origin
properties.summary: The origin of the coordinate system.
